sections: Providing Healthy Learning Environment And Quality Education.
Premier Educational Residential Institution for GIRLS.

LPS Vidyawadi is located in the most picturesque and peaceful part of western Rajasthan. Vidyawadi is the premier educational residential institution for girls only. About 67 years ago, a few visionaries realised the importance of girls education and took initiative to make Vidyawadi a reality. With the support of the eminent donors, it continued to consolidate its sound management practices, democratic management system and infrastructural advancement.

The sprawling campus of 65 acres houses 3 educational units: Leela Devi Parasmal Sancheti Kanya Maha vidhyalaya - B.A. / B.Com. / B.C.A (affiliated to JNV University, Jodhpur / B.A.-B.Ed Integrated Course); Marudhar Balika Vidhyapeeth (Hindi Medium) Higher Secondary School (affiliated to RBSE, Ajmer); Leela Devi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School (affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi).

There are 7 hostels in the campus, state of art kitchen and a dining hall, R.O drinking water plant, a huge sports ground, a gymnasium, computer labs, science labs in schools, a guest house, staff quarters and a fleet of buses to ferry students from the peripheral areas.

pages.title: Introduction
sections: Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School aims at providing an excellent education to empower each student to have a true sense of self-respect which will enable her to build her identity, to find her purpose in life and to be of value to society.

The School embraces the challenge of nurturing individual talents and strengths into valued accomplishments by providing an outstanding education that develops character, academic excellence, leadership, social responsibility and physical wellness. It is our endeavour to educate girls from classes L.K.G. to XII, with the CBSE curriculum, in a caring atmosphere.

The management has ensured that no stone is left unturned to provide the students 'a home away from home'. The campus caters for comfortable hostels, an infirmary for minor ailments and a modern kitchen and mess providing healthy, homely and wholesome meals.

The school offers an ethos of tradition, truth, responsibility and respect; a curriculum that meets the challenges of a global society; beautiful infrastructure and facilities for learning; special care and personal attention for every child; and an educational community committed to every child's happiness and success.

To provide healthy learning environment and quality education, encouraging development academically and socially. To nurture girl children, help them grow fully to their potential and become what a human being can become. The school pledges to facilitate full development of every girl child.
Create and maintain a positive and encouraging psycho-social environment.
Treat every child as equal, without prejudice.
Provide opportunities suitable to different capabilities and encourage everyone.
Provide learning opportunities that develop basic skills, knowledge and understanding required by modern society.
Nurture inherent creativity in every possible domain.
Develop critical thinking, enquiry and introspection.
Develop self-confidence and self-esteem in every child.
Provide high quality care and education for holistic development.
Help young ones move from dependency to independence through self-respect, self-discipline and self-reliance.
Promote creativity through planned co-curricular activities.
Initiate scientific enquiry and hunger for knowledge.
Maintain an ethos and course structure that raises every pupil's achievement.
Inculcate love and responsibility towards fellow living beings and the nation.
Understand and value own culture and heritage and respect other cultures.
Promote equality and diversity, preparing children to be members of a global society.

pages.title: Resources
sections: Teaching Faculty: A team of well-qualified, experienced, young and vibrant staff aims to strengthen students' skills and cultivate talents to meet changing education trends.
Colourful Junior Wing: Planned with vibrant hues and shapes, toys, puzzles, books, teaching aids, toy room, swings, slides, play items and audio visual room.
Digital classrooms with Modern IFP: Smart classrooms are equipped with digitized syllabus content and Interactive Flat Panels for audio-visual learning.
Computer Lab: Fully loaded computer lab with internet facility.
Science Lab: Integrated science lab with equipment, instruments, specimens, models and charts.
Library: Well-equipped, spacious library with newspaper, reference books, journals, magazines, encyclopedias, GK books and books for competitive exams.
Musical Instruments: Keyboards, guitars, tabla set, harmoniums, drum sets, violins, congo and octopods.
Sports: Gymnastic, aerobics, badminton, table tennis, carom, chess, athletics, softball, handball, cricket, basketball, hockey, kabbadi, kho-kho and skating.
Clubs: Literary, Drama, Oratory, Hindi, Life-skill, Music, Dance, Heritage, Eco, Red Cross, Reader's Integrity, S.U.P.W., Science, Maths, Social Service, Sports and more.
Science Exhibition and Craft Fair: Conducted under 'budding scientist' and 'social explorers' banners.
Gold medals: toppers of class X & XII; national level players; best student of the school and hostel.
Certificates and prizes: academic excellence, CCA performance, sports performance, best house, best sports star, most disciplined student and 100% attendance.

pages.title: Rules and Regulations
sections: Any concern regarding a child should be given in writing to the Principal with proper student details.
Office enquiry time on weekdays: 11:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
Principal meeting time on weekdays: 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM only.
Changes in address or phone number should be registered with the school office at the earliest.
75% attendance is compulsory in an academic year.
Students can remain absent only with sanctioned leave.
For emergency, the child is allowed out only with one parent or guardian.
Reporting on the opening day is compulsory; delay costs Rs. 200 per day as fine.
Parents are responsible for classroom learning loss during long absenteeism.
Co-curricular activities are integral to school syllabus; participation is compulsory.
Parents are expected to sign and follow the school diary and test papers regularly.
Parents are requested to attend all PTMs; PTMs after half yearly and annual exams are compulsory.
Students are not allowed to carry cell phones / I-Pod / MP3 players; if found, fine is Rs. 1000 and strict disciplinary action.
Disciplinary action will be taken for damaging school property.
Participation in school events is compulsory; parent support is mandatory.
School rules may be amended; parents/students should keep track and adhere to them.

pages.title: Investiture Ceremony
sections: The charge for the session is taken by: Head Girl - Ms. Rajbala Chouhan; Vice-Head Girl - Ms. Raj Kanwar; Assembly Prefect - Ms. Kumkum Saini; Sports Prefect - Ms. Jaisal Singh Shekhawat; Discipline Prefect - Ms. Kritika Rathore; Literary Prefect - Ms. Sakshi Jhala; House Prefect (Laxmibai House) - Ms. Akanska Balot; House Prefect (Padmawati House) - Ms. Rambala Chouhan; House Prefect (Sarojini Naidu House) - Ms. Varsha Kanwar; House Prefect (Vijaylaxmi House) - Ms. Panchan Kanwar.

pages.title: Vidyawadi Support System
sections: Ambience: Peaceful environment, unpolluted air, sprawling lawns, open-air performing stages and huge sports ground.
Abodes: Mix of old and new quarters for those in service of children.
Hostels: Seven two-storeyed hostels for 660 students; each hostel has 2 wardens and 2 house maids; smaller children hostel has 2 wardens and 5 house maids.
Kitchen and Dining Halls: Kitchen area and organized dining hall seating 400 students at a time.

Meal: Lunch and dinner include rice, dal, chappatis, green vegetable and dry vegetable; breakfast and snack include one dry item and one freshly cooked item; milk and biscuits at night; items prohibited in Jainism are not offered or allowed on campus.
Water Supply: Overhead and underground water tanks, solar water heating for each hostel and kitchen, uninterrupted R.O. drinking water.
Health Care: Part-time doctor and full-time nurse.
Bal Dukan: Tuck shop for daily-use items.
Transportation: Fleet of buses for surrounding areas up to 50 km.
Facilities: Extracurricular activities, NCC and NSS wing; 1800 girls enrolled, 650 staying on campus.

pages.title: Admission Procedure
sections: Subject to availability of seats and irrespective of caste and creed, the school admits girls from Nursery to XI Std.
Girls underage or overage beyond reasonable limit may not be considered.
Admission form and prospectus can be collected from school reception.
For queries contact 6377203204 / 6377204209 between 10.00 am and 4.00 pm.
Admissions are provided under RIGHT TO EDUCATION for BPL families, disadvantaged groups, weaker sections and disabled students.
Original transfer certificate (T.C), Migration if from other board.
School report card of preceding year (attested copy).
8 passport size photographs of the student.
One passport size photo of father, mother and guardian.
Income Certificate / BPL Card / Disability certificate as applicable.
Note: Submit documents within a month after admission; failure may lead to cancellation.
Fee can be deposited to account: 'Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Sr. Sec. School Vidyawadi'.
ICICI Branch Code 6846; A/c No. 684601424110; IFSC Code ICIC0006846.
Payment slip should reach the school by post before the declared last date.
Carry Xerox of the payment slip on the next visit.
Caution Money for new entrance: Rs. 1000/- refundable.
Total school fee does not include CBSE registration & examination fees, Olympiad, Aptitude Tests, camps, picnic and tours.
Parents willing to shift ward from Vidyawadi should intimate latest by 31st Jan of the current academic session.
For TC, submit application at least 7 days in advance in prescribed form with prescribed fees.

pages.status: Captured from live page; schedule shown is 2022-23 and should be treated as dated content.
sections: Note: changes in tentative dates will be notified in advance.
Nursery to X: Black & white checks tunic with off-white shirt & belt; black ankle-length socks with off-white strips and black shoes; black band/hair pins.
Class XI & XII: Black & white checks kurta, off-white salwar and dupatta; black ankle-length socks with off-white strips and black shoes; black band/hair pins.
Winters: Nursery to V Std - Black sweater (V neck only); VI to XII Std - Black blazer.
Sports uniform Nursery to X: Deep green divided skirt with white T-shirt and belt; white sports shoes and socks with green strips; white hair band/ribbon.
Lunch: one dry vegetable and chapatti (Mon. to Fri.); meal of choice on Sat.
Pre-primary wing students receive snacks daily during school hours.

pages.title: Academic Curriculum
sections: LPS Vidyawadi offers academic curriculum from Pre-primary to Class XII. The school is affiliated to CBSE for classes L.K.G. to XII. Medium of instruction is English and curricula follow CBSE Board.
Pre-Primary: LKG and UKG, child-friendly classrooms, creativity through art and craft, Hindi/English letters and words, basic arithmetic.
Primary (Std. I to V): Formal academics with focus on cognitive, emotional, social, physical and motor development; 'Learning by Doing' approach.
Middle: Equal emphasis on curricular and co-curricular activities, CBSE guidelines, socially useful productive work and Physical and Health Education.
Secondary: Classes IX and X focus on academics and board exam preparation, with art, craft and music for all-round development.
Senior Secondary: Classes XI and XII provide academic and competitive knowledge, board exam preparation, and stream choice according to interest.
The school identifies each child's potential and provides support for gifted students and those with special needs.
Parallel remedial classes support students in Mathematics, English and Hindi and help overcome academic difficulties.
Assessment follows CBSE's competency-based pattern under the National Education Policy with periodic assessment, internal assessment, project/practical work and theory exams.

pages.title: Beyond Academics
sections: Art and Craft: Best out of Waste, Mehendi layout, Gift Wrapping, Rangoli Making, Card and Bookmark Making, Paper Cutting and Folding, Face Painting, Collage, Drawing and Painting, Poster making, flower arrangements, acrylic/glass/fabric paintings and soft toy making.
Music: Indian Classical and Folk music taught in a music room with refined acoustics.
Dance: Indian dance forms and aerobics.

House System: Four houses - Rani Lakshmi Bai House, Padmavati House, Sarojini Naidu House, Vijaya Lakshmi House. Inter-house competitions build tolerance, teamwork, aesthetics, creativity, reading, writing, sports and indoor games.
Sports Complex: Large fields for cricket, football, athletics, hand ball, badminton, table tennis and soft ball. Professional coaches support sports training.
Gymnasium: Fitness training and quality physical education.
Literary activities: debate, extempore, elocution, group discussion, quiz, essay writing, poem recitation, Sanskrit shloka recitation, thought presentation and declamation.
Cultural activities: solo/group dance, solo/group song, skit, fashion show, fancy dress, pantomime and drama; interschool competitions including debate, dance and quiz.
Workshops: Candle and Diya Making, Good Health and Life Style, Nature Walk, Kite Making, Art & Craft, Manners & Etiquettes.

pages.title: Contact Us
sections: Leela Devi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Senior Secondary School.
The campus comes under Khimel Village Panchayat, located in Pali District, Rajasthan. It is on Rani - Falna route, 3 km from Rani and 11 km from Falna station.
Delhi - Jaipur - Ajmer - Marwar - Ahmadabad route.
From Rani and Falna by road to Vidyawadi.
Leeladevi Parasmal Sancheti English Medium Senior Secondary School.
Managed by: Marudhar Mahila Shikshan Sangh, Vidyawadi, Khimel, Station - Rani, District - Pali, Rajasthan, Pincode - 306115.
